Package egovframework.let.sym.cal.service.impl

Class EgovCalRestdeManageServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl
egovframework.let.sym.cal.service.impl.EgovCalRestdeManageServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
EgovCalRestdeManageService
@Service("RestdeManageService") public class EgovCalRestdeManageServiceImpl extends org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl implements EgovCalRestdeManageService
휴일에 대한 서비스 구현클래스를 정의한다
Since:
2009.04.01
Version:
1.0
Author:
공통서비스 개발팀 이중호
See Also:
